products.name: Sandwich Panels
products.description: High-quality insulation, fire-resistant, long service life.
products.longDescription: PIR sandwich panels are a modern building material characterized by high thermal insulation, fire safety, and long service life.

products.name: Refrigeration Chambers
products.description: Special temperature regime, quick installation, hermetic seal.
products.longDescription: Refrigeration chambers are professional cooling systems designed for storing various types of products.

products.name: Warehouse Systems
products.description: Quickly erected warehouses, logistics centers, workshops.
products.longDescription: Warehouse systems are quickly erected and cost-effective industrial buildings.

images.title: Raw Material Supply System
images.description: Special tanks and raw material mixing system located at the top of the line. Here, components for the inner part of the panel are prepared.

images.title: Cold Room Assembly Workshop
images.description: Central control unit for the entire line. The production process is fully digitized, minimizing human factor.

images.title: Conveyor and Forming Section
images.description: Long conveyor line for forming and moving finished panels. Equipped with special safety markings.

images.title: Hydraulic Pressing System
images.description: Hydraulic piston system for pressing panels under high pressure and ensuring density.

images.title: Finished Product Output Section
images.description: Section where finished sandwich panels are directed for packaging. Here panels undergo inspection according to specified dimensions.
